name: C-3 manifest envelope includes a signature field for the project-local key signing per the architecture
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/emit-provenance-manifest.sh" --commit abc123 --out m.json --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("m.json","utf8"));process.exit("signature" in j?0:1)' && echo signed 1>&2
